fields.summary: Fills <paramref name="dst" /> with the path equivalent of the stroke effect applied to <paramref name="src" />.

params.src: The source path to compute the fill path for.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the computed fill path.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the destination path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst);

fields.summary: Fills <paramref name="dst" /> with the path equivalent of the stroke effect applied to <paramref name="src" />, transformed by the specified matrix.

params.src: The source path to compute the fill path for.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the computed fill path.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the destination path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.summary: Fills <paramref name="dst" /> with the path equivalent of the stroke effect applied to <paramref name="src" />, clipped to the specified rectangle.

params.src: The source path to compute the fill path for.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the computed fill path.
params.cullRect: The optional cull rectangle to limit the output.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the destination path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect);

fields.summary: Fills <paramref name="dst" /> with the path equivalent of the stroke effect applied to <paramref name="src" />, using the specified resolution scale.

params.src: The source path to compute the fill path for.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the computed fill path.
params.resScale: The resolution scale used to determine path precision.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the destination path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, float resScale);

fields.summary: Fills <paramref name="dst" /> with the path equivalent of the stroke effect applied to <paramref name="src" />, clipped to the specified rectangle and transformed by the specified matrix.

params.src: The source path to compute the fill path for.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the computed fill path.
params.cullRect: The optional cull rectangle to limit the output.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the destination path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, SkiaSharp.SKMatrix matrix);

fields.summary: Fills <paramref name="dst" /> with the path equivalent of the stroke effect applied to <paramref name="src" />, clipped to the specified rectangle and using the specified resolution scale.

params.src: The source path to compute the fill path for.
params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the computed fill path.
params.cullRect: The optional cull rectangle to limit the output.
params.resScale: The resolution scale used to determine path precision.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the destination path is not empty; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public bool GetFillPath (SkiaSharp.SKPath src, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, SkiaSharp.SKRect cullRect, float resScale);
